---
title: "Facial metrics generated from manually and automatically placed image landmarks are highly correlated"
authors: "Jones, A. L., Schild, C., & Jones, B."
year: 2021
date: 2021-01-01
pub-journal: "Evolution and Human Behavior"
volume: "42(3)"
pages: "186–193"
doi: "10.1016/j.evolhumbehav.2020.09.002"
pdf: "assets/papers/2021/Jones_Schild_Jones_2021.pdf"
categories: [morphometrics, methodology]
---
